overview.title: Sales win rate
overview.oneLineSummary: Win rate declined to 24%, down from 32% last week as enterprise deals face longer cycles.

provenance.formulaDescription: Illustrative fixture — replace with real SQL when wired to CRM.

expanded.execSummary: Win rate has decreased materially; competition and budget scrutiny are showing up in late-stage losses.

takeawayBreakdown.expectedOrUnexpected: Partly expected given seasonal pressure; magnitude warrants attention.

expanded.benchmarkComparison: Below typical range for similar B2B SaaS at seed stage (illustrative benchmark).
expanded.rootCauseAnalysis: Longer sales cycles and more stakeholders on enterprise deals; several late losses cited price and procurement delays.
expanded.rootCauseRationale: 1) Count wins/losses in period. 2) Segment enterprise vs SMB. 3) Review loss reasons in CRM notes sample.

provenance.formulaDescription: Same as overview — narrative must align with provenance.
